data.title: China's Alibaba Eyes $100 Billion In Cloud, AI Revenue Over Five Years
data.description: Alibaba Group Holding announced plans to generate $100 billion in annual external revenue from its cloud and AI businesses in the next five years. The T-Head chip unit's production progress was disclosed for the first time. CEO Eddie Wu Yongming shared that token consumption on the Model Studio platform has increased sixfold in the last three months. He also predicted that model-as-a-service offerings will drive the cloud division's growth. Alibaba has started large-scale production of its in-house GPUs, with T-Head division shipping over 470,000 AI chips, nearing 10 billion yuan ($1.45 billion) in annual revenue in the past two years. Jiang Fan, head of Alibaba's e-commerce business, highlighted the goal to surpass 1 trillion yuan ($144.92 billion) in quick-commerce GMV by FY2028 and achieve profitability.

data.title: Groupama Group 2025 Results
data.description: Groupama has reported impressive financial results, showing a 22.8% increase in economic operating income. Net income for the company has reached a significant milestone of €1.0 billion.

data.title: 3iQ Joins Global Elite with WealthBriefing European Award 2026
data.description: 3iQ Corp., a leading institutional digital asset investment solutions provider, has won the "Digital Assets Solution/Fund Manager" category at the WealthBriefing European Awards 2026 in Toronto on March 20, 2026. The company has been acknowledged for its innovative approach in managing digital assets.

data.title: Global Footwear Market to Surpass USD 439.95 Billion by 2032, Driven by Rising Athleisure Trends and Expanding Consumer Demand | Vyansa Intelligence
data.description: A recent report by Vyansa Intelligence reveals that the Global Footwear Market is estimated to experience a steady growth rate of approximately 2.94% between 2026 and 2032. This growth is mainly attributed to the rising consumer demand for comfortable footwear options.

data.title: Hankook's iON Race Heads to Formula E's Longest Circuit for Madrid Debut
data.description: Round 6 of Formula E Season 12 is scheduled to take place in Madrid on March 21st at the Circuito del Jarama. The track at Jarama, spanning 3.934 km, will be the longest circuit in Formula E history. The event will showcase new features like PIT BOOST, an updated ATTACK MODE, and a 23-lap race. Hankook's iON Race will be used for its reliable grip and ability to maintain thermal stability on Jarama's challenging track.

data.title: Bionano Genomics Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Bionano Genomics, Inc. is set to announce its Q4 earnings on March 23 after the market closes. Analysts forecast the San Diego-based company to post a quarterly loss of $1.40 per share with revenue hitting $7.85 million. Bionano Genomics previously projected Q4 revenue to range between $7.8 million and $8.0 million, and anticipates total revenue for FY25 to stand at $28.4 million to $28.6 million. The company's shares concluded trading at $1.12 on Thursday.
